programmes.show_description: Thriller with Henry Cavill. A man searching for his abducted family discovers that his father has been leading a double-life as a CIA agent - and has stolen top-secret information. (2012)
Movie star Bunny Blake receives a mysterious opal ring from her hometown fan club which enables her to see images of her friends and family. S5, Ep13
After causing a hit-and-run accident that killed a child, then letting his co-worker take the blame, a man is relentlessly haunted by his suddenly aggressive car. S5, Ep14
Legend returns soon.
Put the pleasure back into shopping from the comfort of your home and choose from a selection of innovative products.
Action-packed adventure on the high seas! A billionaire discovers that he must complete seven seemingly impossible tasks to prevent the apocalypse in this modern retelling of the classic myth. (2010)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Hooker and his partner investigate a series of attacks on women, in which the assailant always leaves a Bible behind. S1, Ep2
Cathy risks her life to help Hooker catch two drug dealers responsible for a teenager's death while working as a volunteer at City Hospital. S1, Ep3
Romano and Hooker pursue a van for a traffic violation and end up tackling a gang of ex-bikers involved in gun-running. S1, Ep4
Hooker and his partner Romano try to protect an important witness in a murder trial. S1, Ep5
Hooker is convinced that his latest murder investigation is linked to an unsolved case from eight-years ago - and that he might be searching for a serial killer. S2, Ep1
Comedy Western with John Wayne. A hard-drinking cattle baron is determined to stop events spiralling out of control when he finds himself battling land grabbers - and his estranged wife. (1963)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
WWII drama with John Wayne. Two disgraced Navy officers must prove their worth in the aftermath of the attack on Pearl Harbour when they're placed in charge of a vital counter-offensive. (1965)
A space commander returns from a decades-long solo mission into deep space, only to discover that some things haven't changed at all. S5, Ep15
A man trying to win back his girlfriend discovers that he has the ability to trade physical characteristics with whoever agrees to the swap. S5, Ep16
Claustrophobic horror with Olivia Williams. A US submarine crew on a routine mission during WWII descends into madness after an unrelenting series of terrifying and sinister events. (2002)
Historical action with Michael Fassbender. A Roman centurion leads his men on a daring mission to rescue his captured general after his legion is wiped out by Pictish rebels. (2010)
Action-packed revenge thriller starring Chuck Norris. When his partner is murdered by a drug gang terrorising the city, Detective Sean Kane goes rogue in search of revenge. (1981)
Comedy spy thriller with Chevy Chase. A stockbroker is made accidentally invisible in a scientific experiment, and has to go on the run to escape from devious CIA agents. (1992)

Put the pleasure back into shopping from the comfort of your home and choose from a selection of innovative products.
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern martial arts western. A corrupt sheriff fakes an accident to disguise his murder of a trucker who refused to help his drug smuggling. S6, Ep10
Hooker is convinced that his latest murder investigation is linked to an unsolved case from eight-years ago - and that he might be searching for a serial killer. S2, Ep1
Vincent and Scoville ambush an alien briefcase exchange, and the evidence they obtain suggests there is an Invader in high government in Washington.
Sci-fi comedy horror sequel. After an oil pipeline engineer unknowingly brings home a frozen specimen of the original Blob from the North Pole, it defrosts, terrorises and consumes the locals. (1972)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Adventure based on true events. When a deadly diphtheria epidemic strikes the children of Nome, Alaska, a group of mushers must travel 700 miles through a blizzard to bring them the vaccine. (2019)
Medieval drama with Charlton Heston. When an 11th-century knight falls for another man's wife, her vengeful spouse ignites a civil war by influencing the knight's brother to turn against him. (1965)
The Enterprise is hijacked by a group searching for the idyllic planet of Eden, but Kirk is stunned to learn the truth about the supposedly blissful paradise. S3, Ep20/24
Alien invasion drama. Vincent investigates when a young girl who witnessed an alien's death and vaporisation near to a religious shrine puts the event down to a holy miracle.
An old friend of Hooker is arrested for a series of hold-ups at local supermarkets, but the cop is not convinced of his guilt and sets out to bring the culprits to book. S2, Ep2
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Carlos' nephew is in trouble with the law when a gun is found in his room... S6, Ep11
Thriller with Jason Statham and Paddy Considine. It's a tense game of cat-and-mouse when two officers in southeast London set out to hunt for a serial killer targeting fellow police officers. (2011)
Tense thriller with Samuel L Jackson. When a hostage negotiator is framed for murder, he turns the tables by taking captives of his own to ensure his pleas of innocence are heard. (1998)
